patents.title: Recurrent Quantum Feature Maps for Reservoir Computing
patents.summary: A patent covering a quantum reservoir computing framework using a recurrent feature map circuit, enabling practical time-series modeling on near-term quantum hardware.

patents.title: Coherent Feed-Forward Quantum Neural Network
patents.summary: A patent on the coherent feed-forward quantum neural network (CFFQNN) architecture, introducing a novel design for quantum classification circuits.

patents.title: Resource efficient quantum kernel with iterative appending for support vector machines
patents.summary: A patent covering a quantum kernel method optimized for reduced qubit and gate requirements, making quantum-enhanced classification viable on near-term hardware.
